full_text:
Xu Yi 許儀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Yi (許儀). Led the attack on Nanzheng, but was defeated by Shu’s Lu Xun. Executed by Zhong Hui. Xu Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xu Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
